subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-before-Mustafa! Hearken unto the Call from the Crimson Tree upon the luminous Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل مصطفی ان استمع الندآء من السدره الحمرآء علی البقعه النورآء من
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
